# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  contentVersion: "1.0.0.0",
  parameters: {
    "location": {
      type: "string",
      defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]",
      metadata: {
        description: "Location for all resources."
      }
    },
    "vmCount": {
      type: "int",
      defaultValue: 2,
      metadata: {
        description: "The number of VMs to create."
      }
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      type: "string",
      metadata: {
        description: "Admin username for the VMs."
      }
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      type: "secureString",
      metadata: {
        description: "Admin password for the VMs."
      }
    }
  },
  resources: [
    {
      type: "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      name: "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      location: "[parameters('location')]",
      properties: {
        addressSpace: {
          addressPrefixes: [
            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        },
        subnets: [
          {
            name: "default",
            properties: {
              addressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/24"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      apiVersion: "2020-06-01",
      name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), copyIndex())]",
      location: "[parameters('location')]",
      dependsOn: [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
      ],
      copy: {
        name: "virtualMachinesLoop",
        count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      properties: {
        hardwareProfile: {
          vmSize: "Standard_DS1_v2"
        },
        osProfile: {
          computerName: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), copyIndex())]",
          adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        },
        storageProfile: {
          imageReference: {
            publisher: "MicrosoftWindowsServer",
            offer: "WindowsServer",
            sku: "2019-Datacenter",
            version: "latest"
          },
          osDisk: {
            createOption: "FromImage",
            managedDisk: {
              storageAccountType: "Standard_LRS"
            }
          }
        },
        networkProfile: {
          networkInterfaces: [
            {
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('nicName'), copyIndex()))]",
              primary: true
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      apiVersion: "2020-06-01",
      name: "[concat(parameters('nicName'), copyIndex())]",
      location: "[parameters('location')]",
      dependsOn: [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
      ],
      copy: {
        name: "networkInterfacesLoop",
        count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      properties: {
        ipConfigurations: [
          {
            name: "ipconfig1",
            properties: {
              privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic",
              publicIPAddress: {
                id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('publicIpName'), copyIndex()))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ],
        subnet: {
          id: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/', parameters('vnetName'), '/subnets/default')]"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      type: "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      apiVersion: "2020-06-01",
      name: "[concat(parameters('publicIpName'), copyIndex())]",
      location: "[parameters('location')]",
      copy: {
        name: "publicIpsLoop",
        count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      properties: {
        publicIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
      }
    }
  ]
}
